description:
Adds language-aware motions: jump to next function/class, select function parameters, swap arguments. Complements existing mini.ai setup rather than replacing it.

Affected area: `home-modules/editors/neovim/editing/`

comments.text: nvf update to 85ca579 did not fix the issue. nvim-treesitter.config module still not found at runtime. This is an upstream nvf bug - their treesitter packaging uses lzn-auto-require which can't resolve the module.
nvf 4de19e1 (2026-04-20) still has the lzn-auto-require bug. nvim-treesitter.config module not found at runtime. This is an nvf packaging issue, not a config issue.

title: Add treesitter-textobjects
